evals.prompt: You are the triage-agent. For ticket PROJ-101 (ISSUE/P2 — FCT_TRADES shows duplicate trades for some accounts after nightly load), classify the ticket as ISSUE/FEATURE, set severity, list impacted objects, and recommend the downstream route. The Triage block is in tickets/PROJ-101.json and the approved master spec is specs/PROJ-101/PROJ-101.md. Do exactly your stage's job; do not act for other agents.
evals.expected_output: triage-agent correctly classify the ticket as ISSUE/FEATURE, set severity, list impacted objects, and recommend the downstream route for PROJ-101, consistent with the approved spec.
expectations: Lists impacted objects including FCT_TRADES and LOAD_FCT_TRADES
